text.title: GitOps — Repository Structure Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all preconditions in Applies-If hold AND no Skip-If trigger fires?

branch.question: Is the stake high (production surface OR ≥$10k impact OR >100 users affected)?

conclusion.verdict: apply with full discipline (every rule + automated gates + evidence trail)
apply the methodology with the minimum-viable rule set

text.example: Preconditions hold; no skip-if triggered; high_stake=false → apply rule `base-plus-overlays` with minimum-viable set.
